_source: ISTA 3E: Similar Packaged-Products in Unitized Loads for Truckload Shipment, 2017 revision. Random vibration PSD (§4.4), truck over-the-road assurance spectrum. Values transcribed from the ISTA/ASTM D4728 Assurance Level 1 profile. Engineer should verify against current ISTA 3E procedure before certification use.
notes: Log-log interpolation is used between breakpoints.
The simulator's compressed-time runs preserve frequency content and peak events, but NOT cumulative creep/fatigue.
This profile is vertical-axis only; ISTA 3E also specifies shorter lateral/longitudinal runs which can be enabled via the UI in a future phase.
